What We Do

Detailing services built around your vehicle’s finish

Every service starts with an inspection and finishes with a quality check — no shortcuts, no upsells you don’t need.

Ceramic Coating

A multi-layer nano-ceramic shield bonds directly to your paint for a deep, glass-like gloss, hydrophobic water-beading and serious UV resistance — protection that's still performing years down the track.

Learn More

Paint Protection Film

Self-healing, optically clear film engineered to absorb stone chips, scratches and road debris on your most vulnerable panels — invisible armour that keeps factory paint factory-fresh.

Learn More

Paint Correction

Multi-stage machine polishing lifts swirl marks, oxidation and water spots, correcting the surface back to a deep mirror finish before any coating or film goes on.

Learn More

Interior Detailing

Steam extraction, leather conditioning and fabric protection lift years of grime from seats, carpets and trim — restoring that just-delivered cabin feel.

Learn More

The Transformation

Drag to see the difference correction makes

Swirl marks, oxidation and dull clear coat — corrected back to a deep, mirror-like reflection.

After — Mirror Gloss
Before — Dull & Swirled

Why Choose Us

The difference is in the detail

Five reasons Perth car owners trust us with vehicles they genuinely care about.

01

Professional-Grade Products

We work exclusively with internationally certified ceramic coatings, films and polishes — the same products trusted by leading detailing studios worldwide.

02

Attention to Every Detail

Every panel, shut line and badge is inspected under dedicated detailing lights before we consider a job finished.

03

Certified Techniques

Our detailers are trained in correct ceramic application, PPF installation and safe correction methods — protecting your paint, not just polishing it.

04

Long-Lasting Protection

Coatings and films are backed by multi-year warranties, so your investment keeps performing long after you drive away.

05

Premium Customer Experience

From your first call to the final walk-around, expect clear communication and white-glove care from start to finish.

Our Process

From inspection to final inspection

A consistent four-stage process for every vehicle, every time.

01

Vehicle Inspection

We assess paint condition, existing coatings and problem areas, then recommend the right package for your vehicle and budget.

02

Surface Preparation & Correction

Decontamination wash, claying and multi-stage machine polishing correct swirl marks and restore optical clarity.

03

Coating / Protection Application

Ceramic coatings or paint protection film are applied panel by panel in a controlled environment, with full cure time.

04

Final Inspection & Delivery

A final LED-light inspection, full walk-around and aftercare briefing before your vehicle is handed back to you.

Trusted by car owners across Perth

A few words from people who’ve had their vehicles through our studio.

Booked my Mustang in for the ceramic coating package and honestly didn’t expect this level of finish. Water just sheets straight off it now. These guys clearly take pride in the work.

Had PPF done on the front end of our Tesla before a road trip. Picked up two stone chips on the highway that would have absolutely marked the paint — film took the hit instead. Worth every cent.

My ute had years of swirl marks from the car wash down the road. The correction work brought back a finish I genuinely thought was gone for good. Communication throughout was excellent too.

Good to Know

Frequently asked questions

Can’t find what you’re after? Send us a message and we’ll get back to you personally.

Ask a Question

Depending on the coating tier and how the vehicle is maintained, our ceramic coatings are warrantied for 2 to 5 years. With regular maintenance washes, many vehicles continue to bead and resist contamination well beyond the warranty period.

If you drive on Perth highways, gravel roads, or simply want to keep a new car looking new, PPF is one of the best investments you can make. It absorbs stone chips and scratches that would otherwise go straight into your paint, and the self-healing top layer keeps it looking clear for years.

For most daily drivers, a full detail every 6 to 12 months keeps things in great shape, with regular maintenance washes in between. If your vehicle is ceramic coated, maintenance washes every 2 to 4 weeks will keep that coating performing at its best.

An Essential Detail typically takes 2 to 4 hours. Ceramic Shield packages involve correction and cure time, usually 1 to 2 days. Ultimate Protection, including PPF installation, generally takes 3 to 5 days depending on coverage. We'll confirm an exact timeframe when we inspect your vehicle.

Yes, but we recommend waiting at least 7 days to allow the coating to fully cure. After that, hand washing with a pH-neutral shampoo is best — we'll run you through an aftercare routine before you leave.

Correction, coating and PPF work is carried out in our Perth studio where lighting and climate are controlled for the best results. For select maintenance services, mobile appointments around the Perth metro area may be available — ask us when you enquire.
